economic_notes: Subsequent to year-end, First Nation purchased a meat shop in Cochrane, Ontario for $4,000,000. FNFA financing of $23,158,000 obtained for this and other capital projects. Kisis Aski Energy Inc. (50% owned) required refinancing; $12,247,500 loan taken out. COVID-19 impacted operations with periodic band office closures and increased pandemic-specific funding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) financial information was unavailable for several limited partnerships (Pahquataskkahmekook LP, First Nation Yellow Falls LP, Kisis Aski Energy Inc., SE5 2013 LP), making their classification under PSAS undeterminable; (2) budget comparison information was not presented as required by PSAS. Tangible capital assets net book value calculated as 13,666,599 cost minus 4,075,801 accumulated amortization = 9,590,798. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Island Falls Forestry LP, Coral Rapids Power Corporation, and Weekashin Domco LP. First Nation does not consolidate four entities due to unavailable financial information. Loan guarantee outstanding of $15,370,430 for Coral Rapids Power Inc. credit facility. Subsequent event: $23,158,000 FNFA financing for meat shop purchase and other capital projects.
